message:
fix: remove submit_result from reviewer so it must use approve/reject

Restrict() auto-adds submit_result to every subagent's tool set.
The reviewer was ignoring approve/reject and calling submit_result
instead (writing "VERDICT: APPROVE" in the message text — back to
the same text-parsing problem). Remove submit_result after Restrict
so the reviewer has no choice but to use the structured tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -839,6 +839,9 @@ func (s *Session) spawnReviewer(ctx context.Context, claimedResult string) (revi
 	allowed["approve"] = true
 	allowed["reject"] = true
 	subSess.reg.Restrict(allowed)
+	// Restrict auto-adds submit_result; remove it so the reviewer
+	// must use approve/reject (the tool name IS the verdict).
+	subSess.reg.Remove("submit_result")
 
 	// Run reviewer synchronously.
 	_, err = subSess.ProcessInput(ctx, reviewPrompt)
